package.name: robot_hw_bridge
package.description: Hardware bridges for the real robot: - mcore_tcp_bridge: TCP protocol to chassis (M-core), publishes /combined_status and /battery_state, consumes /cmd_vel. - station_tcp_bridge: TCP protocol to station (dock), publishes /station_status and consumes /station/control. - dock_supply_manager: fine docking + supply/charge state machine (station + robot valves + charge relay).
